title: Near-Winner Rank Push Log — Phase 20.6 (Real Pages Only)
policy: Per Real Page Focus Rule, near-winner rank pushes target real pages only. Thin duplicates are not pushed for ranking improvement.
real_page_near_winners_from_fresh_data: PENDING — Fresh GSC page-level data needed to identify current near-winners (positions 1-30, 0 clicks).
note: 34 near-winner list from Phase 20.1 identified 28 thin tool/scenario pages and only 6 real pages. First-click sprint must focus on the 6 real pages, not the 28 thin duplicates.
thin_pages_excluded_from_push: 28 thin tool/scenario near-winners (positions 1-30, 0 clicks) are EXCLUDED from rank push. They will be addressed via parent transfer, not independent SEO.
